nodes.prompt: Scan {{area}} for defects. Return a numbered list of the distinct problems you find, each with the file path and a one-line description.
nodes.label: scan

nodes.prompt: Fix the first defect reported by the scan in {{area}}. Make the minimal change and explain it.
nodes.label: fix-codex

nodes.prompt: Fix the second defect reported by the scan in {{area}}. Make the minimal change and explain it.
nodes.label: fix-claude
